elements.title: Lea Hinz
elements.contents: ... that Lea Hinz (pictured) gave up medical school to perform on the aerial hoop?

elements.title: Temple of ECK
elements.contents: ... that hundreds of residents of Chanhassen, Minnesota, opposed the construction of the Temple of ECK?

elements.title: Carlos Quaremba
elements.contents: ... that South Australian politician Carlos Quaremba said of his childhood, "I was the only wog in the whole school"?

elements.title: a Bronx bank building
elements.contents: ... that, after a Bronx bank building's clock broke, people fired bullets towards it at night?

elements.title: 2015 Mauritian municipal elections
elements.contents: ... that Prime Minister Anerood Jugnauth said municipal residents should be banned from voting if they refused to vote in the 2015 Mauritian municipal elections?

elements.title: Gil Mains
elements.contents: ... that American football player Gil Mains flew feetfirst into opponents?

elements.title: giant root-rats
elements.contents: ... that tunnels created by giant root-rats can reach up to 34 m (112 ft) in length?

elements.title: Mowbray, Manitoba
elements.contents: ... that some children from North Dakota crossed the Canadian border daily to attend school in Mowbray, Manitoba, in the early 1900s?

elements.title: John Fasel
elements.contents: ... that doctors removed six knives from John Fasel's stomach?
